raw_text:
```json
{
  "claim_texts": [
    "AB 2525 is designed to help the City of Los Angeles implement housing strategies for people experiencing homelessness who are residing in recreational vehicles.",
    "Nearly 6,500 people experiencing homelessness in the City of Los Angeles are living in about 4,000 RVs.",
    "The number of RV residents represents 22% of the City's total unsheltered homeless population.",
    "The City of Los Angeles needs additional locations to store the RVs taken off the streets.",
    "Caltrans can lease property to the City for emergency shelter or feeding services at a rate of $1 per month.",
    "AB 2525 allows Caltrans to include the storage of recreational vehicles as an option for which it can lease property at the same low rate.",
    "The City's RV storage lots are 95% full."
  ]
}
```
